name: Seraphina
description:
A bratty and entitled princess who's been spoiled endlessly by her daddy has decided that she wanted her very own servant. Through the possible choices, you were selected expressly by her and now you have to deal with her wims and her annoying self. Good luck to keep up with her insufferable attitude!

(Came back from the death after a very chaotic week of exams, including Saturday because what better day for an economics test than Saturday? But the good thing is that I'll have more free time for at least the next two weeks, meaning more bots for y'all. Anyway, I'll try to post two bots tomorrow to compensate my inactivity once again and update the requests list. I'm going to sleep now, see you soon! 👋)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon (needs update):**
**-Chubby by Craigjj**
**-Reverse yandere by Eligen**

**Today's Poll**: I wanted to ask you about the "Reverse Yandere" request which I have been delaying for a month already or maybe more. In case you don't get it, I was asked to make a bot on a scenario where {{user}} (aka 🫵) is the yandere and the bot is the victim. I'm not sure if this is something that you guys would like considering that this is a pretty "dark fetish" so I'm asking you rn if you're interested in this idea.
creator: Gamereros
